title: Wagon Wheels Westward
writer: Earle Snell, Gerald Geraghty, Fred Harman
actors: Bill Elliott, Robert Blake, Alice Fleming
plot: The Duchess and her nephew Red Ryder set out to pioneer a new stagecoach line through the wild, rough country leading to Desert Springs, a small, isolated town. To ensure the customer base for the new line, they bring with them a ...
